title: The Workflow Blocks Webinar is here!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We just released an amazing feature that will make your apps much more flexible for your users

Workflow blocks give you the ability to make your triggers and actions available in the automation center, so your users can incorporate them in their custom recipes.

We will cover recipes, blocks and how to include them in the custom automation builder.

The webinar will be held on Monday, December 20, 2021 | 10AM EST

Register here!

This webinar is tailored for app developers.

See you there!
